# Senior Product Engineer, ExampleWorks

ExampleWorks is hiring a senior product engineer to build resume intelligence and workflow automation for recruiting teams.

Responsibilities:

- Build accessible React and TypeScript product surfaces.
- Design Node.js APIs and GraphQL integrations for ATS workflows.
- Tune PostgreSQL data models for performance.
- Partner with product managers and customer success on clear workflow improvements.

Required skills:

- TypeScript
- React
- Node.js
- PostgreSQL
- GraphQL
- Accessibility testing
- Performance optimization
- French language ability
